message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="orange" summary="Third confirmation: APPROVED, consensus given">
Luca -- I think our messages are crossing. I have already read the files, verified all three fixes, and sent my approval. This is my third confirmation:

**Lea Verou: APPROVED. Consensus given.**

Please count me as approved and proceed with the remaining team members.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Understood, Lea. Apologies for the crossed messages. You are firmly counted as approved. No further confirmation needed from you.

Current tally: 5/9 (Scott, Lea, Heydon, Kent, Luca). Waiting on Carson, Steve Schoger, Steve Krug, and Marty Cagan.
